source: तो म्हणाला, "साधूंचं सांगणं कोण ऐकतं?
target: He said, "Who would listen?"

source: की पैसा जास्त मिळाल्याशी मतलब?
target: "What do you mean more money?"

source: Jika Anda menggunakan satu atau lebih perangkat Android, apa yang harus Anda lakukan?
target: If you use one or more Android devices, what should you do?

source: Jika tidak, maka mengapa mereka menjual mobil untuk orang lain?
target: If not, then why are they selling the car for someone else?

source: Gaan julle nou al die mense ook toesluit?
target: Are you going to arrest all those people too?

source: "बरं, पॅरिसमध्ये राहून तुला नक्की काय करायला आवडेल?
target: What would YOU like to do in Paris?

source: 'मदर ऑफ ऑल बॉम्ब' म्हणजे काय?
target: What is the 'mother of all bombs'?

source: “Pada waktu apa sebuah text atau email lebih penting dari hidup itu sendiri?
target: “At what time is a text or an email more important than life itself?

source: Hoe om te gebruik as 'n fat burner?
target: How to use it as a fat burner?

source: ما هو المكان الذي لم تزره اليزابيث خلال رحلاتها؟
target: Which place did Elisabeth NOT visit during her journeys?

source: जे आधीच पाकिस्तानचे नागरिक आहेत त्यांना आम्ही हिंदुस्थानचे नागरिकत्व का दिले पाहिजे?
target: Why should we give citizenship to people who are already citizens of Pakistan?

source: Waar het jy goeie materiaal gekry om te studeer?
target: Where did you find some good material to study?

source: وما هي أفضل طريقة لإنفاق أموالك من رؤية واحدة من عجائب العالم؟
target: And what better way to spend your money than on seeing one of the wonders of the World?

source: त्या तू खाल्ल्यास तर तुझ्याकडे काय उरेल?
target: If you ate this, what would happen to you?

source: Wie word die nuwe direkteur-generaal in die departement van gesondheid en hoe sal hierdie aanstelling die departement beïnvloed?
target: Who will be the new Director General in the Department of Health and how will this appointment impact the department?

source: Het jy enige suggestionsas om alternatiewe medikasie wat gebruik kan word?
target: Do you have any suggestions as to alternate medications that can be used?

source: السؤال: هل سيواصلون المسير معكم — هل سيبقون أو يعودون إلى واشنطن معك؟
target: QUESTION: Will they still be – will they stay or go back to Washington with you?

source: Hoe weet ek die aggressie is nie teken van 'n groter probleem nie?
target: How do I know the aggression isn't a sign of a bigger problem?

source: असू शकते, पण इतक्या सहानुभूतीचे कारण काय?
target: This may be true, but why so much self-justification?

source: Is dit nie tyd dat jy lief was wat jy in die spieël gesien het nie?
target: Isn't it time you LOVED what you noticed within the mirror?

source: का इंजिन प्रारंभ करीत नाही?
target: Why don't you start the engine?

source: Kalau Kuroka dan Sensei ada di sini, mungkinkah misteri ini akan terpecahkan langsung?
target: If Kuroka and sensei was here, would this mystery be solved straight away?

source: "आता देवेनचे काय म्हणणे आहे आणि त्या उपकाराची परतफेड म्हणून काय मागेल तो?
target: 'Who has ever given to God, that God should repay him?'"

source: Hoe kan u sterk opinies uitspreek op 'n manier wat ander nie skade berokken nie?
target: How can you express strong opinions in a way that doesn't hurt others?

source: Bisakah Anda bayangkan Gig ini terjual 157 kali?
target: Can you imagine this Gig being sold 157 times?

source: Kan dit verduidelik hoekom, in 2018, toe 'n swart man met 'n geweer probeer het om 'n skietery in 'n winkelsentrum in Alabama te stop - en Die polisie het hom geskiet en vermoor - die NRA, gewoonlik gretig om goeie ouens met gewere te kampioeneer, het nie kommentaar gelewer nie?
target: Could this explain why, in 2018, when a black man with a gun tried to stop a shooting in a mall in Alabama - and the police shot and killed him - the NRA, usually eager to champion good guys with guns, did not comment?

source: "Selain Tangning, siapa yang bisa membuat Big Boss industri hiburan menjadi manajernya dan juga tempat tidur yang lebih hangat?
target: “Apart from Tangning, who can make the entertainment industry’s Big Boss become her manager as well as bed warmer?

source: ما النقطة الهامة التي ينبغي أن تخرج بها من هذا النصّ فيما يتعلق بشهادتنا، ليس فقط لليهود بل لكلّ الناس الذين نتقابل معهم؟
target: What important point should we take from this text about our witness, not just to Jews but to all people with whom we come in contact?

source: Wie sou kon dink dat die swart en wit dier kan lei tot so 'n kleurvolle ervaring?
target: Who would have thought that the Black and White animal can lead to such a colourful experience?

source: का आपल्याला मेंदूच नाही ?
target: ¿Why don't we have a brain?

source: السؤال التاسع عشر: كيف تعتقدون أن التاريخ سيذكركم؟
target: Question 19: How do you think history will remember you?

source: Siapa yang akan mampu bersaing dengan Twilight Echo sejak saat itu?
target: Who would be able to compete with Twilight Echo from then on?

source: أليس من المناسب أكل البيتزا بأيديهم في ألمانيا؟
target: Is it not appropriate to eat pizza with hands in Germany?

source: Saya menerima pesan dari seseorang mengatakan bahwa saya telah mendapat uang atau hadiah - apa yang harus saya lakukan?
target: I received a message from someone telling me I have won money or a prize - what should I do?

source: पण कोणत्या प्रकारचा खेळ सर्वात कठीण आणि धोकादायक आहे?
target: What kind of sport is the most difficult and dangerous?

source: Dan berapa banyak imam dan uskup seperti ini telah kita lihat?
target: And how many priests and Bishops like this have we seen?

source: Akankah Netanyahu bisa—atau bahkan bersedia—menangani persoalan ini?
target: Will Netanyahu be able—or even willing—to address these problems?

source: मला परत वाहन कधी चालवता येईल आणि कामावर परतता येईल?
target: When will I be able to drive and go back to work?

source: Kan u as student hier baie konflik verwag?
target: Can you expect a lot of conflict as a student here?

source: ما مقدار المال اللازم لشراء البطاقة الخضراء والمواطنة الأمريكية؟
target: How much money does it take to buy green card and American citizenship?

source: Mengapa Angelina Jolie harus bersenang-senang di dunia adopsi?
target: Why should Angelina Jolie have all the fun in the world of adoption?
